description_long: This is a modern, square-shaped stool with a soft, light gray upholstered cushion forming the main seating surface. The cushion appears generously padded, with subtle fabric texture visible across its surface, giving it a comfortable and inviting look. The base is constructed from light-colored wood, featuring a slightly angled, faceted design that adds a touch of geometric interest and stability. The transition between the cushion and the wooden base is clean and seamless, with no visible fasteners or decorative elements. The stool sits low to the ground and lacks any backrest or footrest, emphasizing its minimalist and functional design. Its neutral color palette and simple form make it suitable for a variety of urban public spaces, such as lobbies, waiting areas, or parks.
description: A modern, square stool with a light gray upholstered cushion and a faceted light wood base, featuring a minimalist and comfortable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the soft, square gray cushion and the angled wooden base, with the left side slightly more visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the cushion and base appearing symmetrical, highlighting the even padding and clean lines.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the cushion and base fully visible and no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the right side of the cushion and base.
